admissibility_verdict.rule_needed: admissible relabels must preserve the operational tensor product, coupling graph, or declared access factorization

demotion_condition: If a future result allows arbitrary entangling refactorization as an admissible change of reach description, the R1 anti-relabel separator demotes to a coordinate-dependent global-correlation exhibit.

entangling_refactorization_attack.map: y0 = x0 xor x1 xor x2; y1 = x1; y2 = x2

fixture.t411_shadow: canonical finite shadow of T411 beta=0: no proper subset carries the datum, while the full joint does

structure_preserving_relabels.class: qubit permutations + local bit flips; product-basis spot check

verdict: the global-correlation separator survives product-structure-preserving relabels, but arbitrary entangling refactorization localizes the datum into one factor; the fallback therefore needs an explicit factorization/coupling-preservation admissibility rule, not physical-boundary language
